problem text: On the planet Earth II, each pair of parents favors having a male child over a female child. Assume the probability of having a male or female child is the same, and that the gender of each child is statistically independent. If each pair continues to have more children until they have a male child, at which point they cease having children, what percentage of males does this population tend towards over time?
problem hint: This question does not provide a hint.
